---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new prompt or an improvement to an existing one
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does your idea solve?**
<!-- Describe the situation a Scrum Master or team lead faces that this would help with. -->

**Describe the prompt or improvement you'd like**
<!-- What should the prompt do? What output should it produce? -->

**Which GitHub data would it use?**
<!-- e.g. Issues REST API, Projects v2 GraphQL API, Milestones, Labels, Comments... -->

**Are there known limitations?**
<!-- Be honest: what can Copilot NOT compute for this use case? -->

**Additional context**
<!-- Any other information, mockups, or examples. -->
